metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop technical dance skills across multiple styles including ballet, contemporary, and jazz, while building performance quality and body conditioning. This course emphasizes proper alignment, movement efficiency, and expressive capability across diverse dance vocabularies. Students learn to maintain physical health and prevent injury while developing both technical mastery and artistic performance presence.
metadata.general_description: Build technical dance skills across multiple styles with focus on proper technique, conditioning, and performance quality.

big_ideas.statement: Technical proficiency in dance requires dedicated practice, proper alignment, and understanding of body mechanics.
big_ideas.elaboration: Developing technical skill involves learning efficient movement patterns, building muscle memory, and understanding how the body moves safely and effectively across different dance styles.

big_ideas.statement: Diverse dance styles have distinct technical vocabularies, movement qualities, and aesthetic principles.
big_ideas.elaboration: Ballet, contemporary, jazz, and other styles each have unique technical requirements and artistic approaches; dancers who study multiple styles develop versatility and deeper understanding of movement possibilities.

big_ideas.statement: Physical conditioning and body awareness are essential for sustainable dance practice and injury prevention.
big_ideas.elaboration: Dancers develop strength, flexibility, endurance, and proprioceptive awareness to support technical execution, sustain performance, and maintain long-term health as dancers.

big_ideas.statement: Performance quality emerges from technical mastery combined with artistic intention and authentic expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: Strong technique provides the foundation for artistic expression; dancers use technical skill to communicate emotion, interpret choreography, and engage audiences with authentic presence.

competencies.raw: Develop foundational and advanced ballet technique with proper alignment and execution
i_can_statements: I can demonstrate proper posture, turnout, and alignment in ballet positions and movements
I can execute basic and intermediate ballet vocabulary with technical accuracy and control
I can perform across the floor exercises with appropriate mechanics and movement quality
I can apply ballet technique to choreographed movement with artistic expression

competencies.raw: Develop contemporary and modern dance technique with fluidity and control
i_can_statements: I can execute contemporary movement vocabularies with appropriate weight, flow, and dynamics
I can maintain control through floor work, transitions, and suspended movements
I can respond to improvisation prompts with contemporary movement vocabulary
I can apply contemporary technique to choreography with authenticity and presence

competencies.raw: Develop jazz technique with rhythm, isolation, and stylistic expression
i_can_statements: I can demonstrate jazz-specific movements including body isolations and weight shifts
I can execute jazz steps, turns, and combinations with appropriate timing and rhythm
I can maintain rhythmic accuracy while performing jazz choreography
I can express jazz style through movement quality, attitude, and performance energy

competencies.raw: Explore additional dance styles and technical approaches
i_can_statements: I can learn and execute techniques from cultural dance traditions with respect and accuracy
I can explore street dance, hip-hop, or other contemporary movement styles
I can blend techniques from multiple styles to create personalized movement expression
I can adapt quickly to different technical requirements and dance styles

competencies.raw: Analyze technique and understand how proper form supports artistic expression
i_can_statements: I can identify elements of correct technique and explain their purpose and importance
I can recognize how alignment and efficiency affect the quality of movement execution
I can understand how different techniques create different aesthetic qualities and meanings
I can articulate the relationship between technical mastery and artistic expression

competencies.raw: Evaluate my own technical development and set goals for improvement
i_can_statements: I can assess my technical strengths and identify specific areas for continued development
I can recognize progress in my technical execution across multiple dance styles
I can use feedback from teachers and peers to refine my technique
I can set realistic and meaningful goals for technical and artistic growth

competencies.raw: Understand the connection between body awareness and effective movement
i_can_statements: I can identify how alignment and body awareness affect movement efficiency and quality
I can recognize proprioceptive information to improve movement control and coordination
I can understand how conditioning supports technical development and injury prevention
I can reflect on the mind-body connection in developing technical mastery

competencies.raw: Develop understanding of different dance aesthetics and technical approaches
i_can_statements: I can explain the aesthetic principles and technical priorities of different dance styles
I can analyze how various techniques create distinctive movement qualities and expressions
I can appreciate the artistry and technical sophistication of professional dancers
I can reflect on my personal preferences and strengths across different dance styles

competencies.raw: Perform choreography with technical precision and performance quality
i_can_statements: I can execute choreographed movement accurately and with appropriate technical quality
I can maintain focus, energy, and presence throughout performance of choreography
I can express artistic intention and emotion through technically sound movement
I can perform different styles with authenticity and stylistic integrity

competencies.raw: Communicate technical concepts and dance vocabulary clearly with peers
i_can_statements: I can explain technical concepts and terminology to support peer learning
I can demonstrate correct technique and provide constructive feedback to others
I can use movement imagery and description to communicate technical understanding
I can collaborate effectively in technical exercises and movement practice

competencies.raw: Document technical learning and reflect on progress
i_can_statements: I can use video or written reflection to assess my technical execution
I can maintain a practice journal documenting technique development and goals
I can track improvements in flexibility, strength, and control over time
I can articulate my technical growth and continued learning priorities

competencies.raw: Demonstrate performance readiness and stage presence
i_can_statements: I can prepare physically and mentally for performance presentations
I can execute choreography with confidence and technical accuracy in performance settings
I can maintain appropriate performance energy and connection with audience or peers
I can respond professionally to performance feedback and continue refinement

competencies.raw: Connect dance technique to anatomical and physiological understanding
i_can_statements: I can understand basic skeletal and muscular anatomy relevant to dance movement
I can apply understanding of body mechanics to improve technical execution
I can understand how conditioning supports technical development and injury prevention
I can make informed decisions about technique modifications based on body awareness

competencies.raw: Explore how professional dancers develop technique and sustain careers
i_can_statements: I can study the training pathways and practices of professional dancers across styles
I can understand the commitment and dedication required for technical mastery
I can explore career opportunities and contexts where diverse dance techniques are valued
I can engage with ongoing professional development and mentorship in dance

competencies.raw: Develop personal artistic voice through technical versatility
i_can_statements: I can blend techniques from multiple styles to create personalized expression
I can use technical skill as a foundation for artistic innovation and creativity
I can identify my strengths and preferences across different dance techniques
I can commit to ongoing technical growth that supports my artistic vision

competencies.raw: Build understanding of dance wellness and sustainable practice
i_can_statements: I can develop and maintain a consistent conditioning and wellness practice
I can identify and address minor injuries or areas of concern with appropriate modifications
I can understand the importance of rest, recovery, and cross-training in dance practice
I can make informed choices about physical wellness that support long-term dance engagement

areas.name: Ballet Technique and Movement Vocabulary
topics: Proper posture, turnout, and alignment in ballet positions and movement
Basic and intermediate ballet vocabulary including positions, movements, and exercises
Across-the-floor exercises and traveling movements in ballet style
Development of balance, control, and extension in ballet technique
Stylistic qualities and aesthetic principles of classical and contemporary ballet

areas.name: Contemporary and Modern Dance Technique
topics: Contemporary movement vocabularies and stylistic approaches
Weight management, flow, and dynamic qualities in contemporary dance
Floor work, transitions, and suspended movements in modern technique
Improvisation and exploration of movement possibilities
Integration of contemporary vocabulary with other dance styles

areas.name: Jazz and Additional Dance Styles
topics: Jazz-specific movements including isolations, body rolls, and weight shifts
Jazz rhythmic accuracy and musicality in movement execution
Jazz styling, attitude, and performance energy in execution
Street dance, hip-hop, and other contemporary styles and techniques
Cultural dance traditions and their technical and aesthetic characteristics

areas.name: Physical Conditioning, Fitness, and Injury Prevention
areas.raw: Physical Conditioning, Fitness, and Injury Prevention
topics: Development of strength, flexibility, and endurance for dance
Body awareness, proprioception, and alignment for efficient movement
Core strength and postural stability in dance execution
Common dance injuries and prevention strategies
Cross-training, conditioning exercises, and wellness practices
Mental preparation and performance readiness
